Container.Name: PosterFlow
Container.Overview: PosterFlow is a self-hosted poster management system that syncs and manages movie and TV show posters across Google Drive using rclone. Features include drive syncing from community preset sources (MM2K, CL2K, etc.), automatic poster renaming to match your Plex/Radarr/Sonarr library, border replacement, unmatched asset detection, direct Plex upload, a built-in scheduler, and real-time job progress via WebSockets. Includes a setup wizard on first launch to configure your media server and Google Drive credentials.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Stores the database, rclone config, logs, default poster storage, and idarr working directory.

Config.Name: Destination Path
Config.Description: Optional: custom destination/asset storage location (e.g. Kometa assets folder). Configure the path in Settings after setup.

Config.Name: Posters Path
Config.Description: Optional: custom poster storage location. Configure the path in subscribed drives after setup.

Config.Name: IDarr Path
Config.Description: Optional: for poster maker's storage location (e.g. poster folder for sync to gdrive). Configure the path in Idarr after setup.

Config.Name: PSD Path
Config.Description: Optional: for poster maker's storage location for PSD files. Configure the path in Maker Tools > TMDB Search settings after setup.

Config.Name: DEBUG
Config.Description: Enable debug logging on startup. Can also be toggled in-app Settings.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: File log verbosity when debug mode is off (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR)
